clean_headline: J.K. Cement subsidiary received notice under Legal Metrology Act, 2009
raw_headline:
Dear Sir / Madam,

Please find enclosed the update of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL), a listed material subsidiary of the Company.

You are requested to take the same on your record.
